title: prostanthera junonis
intro: Prostanthera junonis, also known as the 'Junonia Mintbush', is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in essential oils, particularly carvone and limonene, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects, providing health benefits such as relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. Prostanthera junonis is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or topical cream for its medicinal uses.
